description_long: This sculpture depicts an angelic figure standing upright on a rectangular pedestal. The angel has large, detailed wings extending from its back, and is dressed in flowing, layered robes that drape naturally to the base. The figure's head is bowed slightly, with wavy hair and a serene facial expression. One hand is raised with two fingers extended, while the other hand is relaxed and held lower. The wings are textured with feather details, and the robes show deep folds and realistic fabric movement. The entire sculpture appears to be carved from a single block of stone or concrete, with a weathered, matte gray finish.
description: A detailed stone angel sculpture with large wings, flowing robes, and a serene expression, standing on a rectangular pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel's face, raised hand, and full detail of the robes and wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the wings, the draping of the robes, and the profile of the head and hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span and feather texture of the wings, as well as the back of the robes and pedestal.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, the angel's lowered hand, and the layered folds of the garment.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; the sculpture is isolated on a plain background.
